aboutMe.summaryCommerce: I've worked on e‑commerce sites, various admin panels, high‑load systems, microservice architecture, and blockchain integrations.
aboutMe.architectureLeadIn: I've contributed to the architecture of projects such as:
architectureList: Prediction markets app (web / mobile / Telegram mini app)

Crypto service with personalized ai-sdk recommendations (as an MCP server) analyzing exchange accounts (Bybit / Coinbase / Binance) and third‑party data (Coingecko, Messari, Defillama, Coinmarketcap). Smart contracts, native Solidity contracts, wallet connect and operations.
aboutMe.bioOnBlue:
I've been involved in the full product lifecycle — from idea to a working MVP

I've maintained and extended existing services

I aim for clean, readable code (in the spirit of Robert C. Martin) and cover it with unit, integration, and e2e tests

I mentor others, run interviews, and onboard new developers

I'm responsible, goal‑oriented, friendly, attentive, and continuously self‑taught

I'm open to complex, interesting challenges
aboutMe.petProjectsIntro: Below is a list of personal projects I've built in my spare time to sharpen skills and deepen my understanding of the technologies I use. Repos are open, continuously improved, and covered with tests. Each one reflects the quality of my code:
aboutMe.petNpmReposBodyBefore: A set of npm packages that streamline how I work with technologies I use often. They're also published on the
aboutMe.petCryptoBody: Wallet connection, web3, smart contract events, JSONRpcProvider, WebSocket RPC provider events. Internal balance in internal tokens (without listing), parameterized NFT minting, selling NFTs/collections at fixed price or auction, NFT transfers and downloads. ERC‑20 / ERC‑721. Microservice backend architecture.
aboutMe.petMessengerBody: One of my first pet projects — a messenger. User profiles, private and public chats. Monolithic architecture.
